title: Check AI Builder Credits in Copilot Studio
author: Seena Khan
summary:
To check the remaining AI Builder credits used by your Microsoft Copilot Studio, you need to check it from the Power Platform Admin Center, because AI Builder credits are managed at the tenant/environment level, not directly inside Copilot Studio.

Here is the step-by-step guide 👇

Method 1 — Check AI Builder Credits (Recommended)

Step 1: Open Power Platform Admin Center

Go to:
Power Platform Admin Center
https://admin.powerplatform.microsoft.com

Sign in with Admin or Environment Admin account.

Step 2: Go to Capacity

  1. Click Resources (Left menu)
  2. Click Capacity
  3. Select AI Builder tab

You will see:

  • Total AI Builde
full_text:
To check the remaining AI Builder credits used by your Microsoft Copilot Studio, you need to check it from the Power Platform Admin Center, because AI Builder credits are managed at the tenant/environment level, not directly inside Copilot Studio.

Here is the step-by-step guide 👇

 
 
 Method 1 — Check AI Builder Credits (Recommended)

 
 
 Step 1: Open Power Platform Admin Center

Go to:

Power Platform Admin Center

https://admin.powerplatform.microsoft.com

Sign in with Admin or Environment Admin account.

 
 
 Step 2: Go to Capacity

Click Resources (Left menu)

Click Capacity

Select AI Builder tab

You will see:

Total AI Builder Credits

Used Credits

Remaining Credits

Consumption trend

Example:

Metric
Value

Total Credits
1,000,000

Used
350,000

Remaining
650,000

 
 
 Method 2 — Check by Environment

Go to Environments

Select your environment

Click Capacity

View AI Builder usage

This shows which environment (like Copilot Studio agent) is consuming credits.

 
 
 Method 3 — Check from AI Builder Page

Go to

AI Builder

https://ai.builder.microsoft.com

Then:

Click Usage

View consumption by:

Model

Flow

Copilot

Environment

 
 
 What Consumes AI Builder Credits in Copilot Studio

These features consume credits:

✅ Generative Answers

✅ AI Prompts

✅ Document Processing

✅ GPT-based Responses

✅ Data Extraction

✅ Image Generation

 
 
 Example Credit Consumption

Feature
Credit Usage

Generative Answer
Medium

AI Prompt
Medium

Document Processing
High

GPT Content Generation
Medium

 
 
 Pro Tip (Important)

If you're using:

Azure OpenAI Service
instead of AI Builder

Then credits come from Azure, not AI Builder.

So check:

Azure Portal

Azure OpenAI Usage

Token consumption

 
 
 Quick Troubleshooting

If you cannot see AI Builder capacity:

Possible reasons:

Not admin

No AI Builder license

No credits assigned

Wrong environment selected

 
 
 Best Practice (Enterprise)

Monitor credits weekly:

Prevent agent failure

Avoid service interruption

Track usage by department

Hope you enjoy the session.

Please leave a comment below if you have any further questions.

Happy Sharing !!!

Keep Learning | Spread Knowledge | Stay blessed |
